title: Yieldblox - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to liquidity drain on a DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle prices and then borrows large amounts of assets in the same transaction.

red_flags: Single transaction causing significant price manipulation
Large asset borrow immediately following price manipulation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ORACLE_PRICE_MANIPULATION -> LARGE_ASSET_BORROW in single tx
summary: An attacker manipulated the Reflector oracle to report an inflated price of USTRY, allowing them to borrow millions of dollars worth of XLM and USDC from the YieldBlox DAO Pool on Blend V2. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting oracle price manipulation followed by large asset borrowing.
